productDisplayName: Carlton London Men's Semi Formal Coffee Shoe
description: Perfect for those formal and semi-formal occasions, this pair of leather oxford shoes from carlton london is designed for the man of style.Upper Leather upper with a long tongue for enhanced durability and style Stitch detailing along heel cup length for enhanced durability Reinforced overlay along side forefoot covering the toe area for Lace-up system for snug Fit Midsole TPU midsole for durability and comfort Mildly cushioned footbed for protection Branding on footbed heel for style Outsole TPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfort Horizontally multi-grooved in forefoot and V-shaped in heel for maximum grip and traction Raised heel unit for style shoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
